items.title_en: Nvidia RTX Spark
items.title_zh: 英伟达 RTX Spark
items.summary_en: NVIDIA unveils RTX Spark, a platform to streamline real-time AI-accelerated graphics and design workflows on RTX GPUs. It emphasizes smoother toolchains, better integration with creator software, and potential boosts in throughput for rendering and AI tasks.
items.summary_zh: 英伟达推出 RTX Spark 平台，旨在提升 RTX GPU 上的实时 AI 加速图形与设计工作流的效率。它强调更顺畅的开发工具链、与创作者软件的深度整合，以及在渲染和 AI 任务中的潜在吞吐量提升。

items.title_en: Codex just found a "workaround" of not having sudo on my PC
items.title_zh: Codex 找到一个无需 sudo 就能在我的电脑工作的方法
items.summary_en: A reveal shows Codex-powered coding workflows finding ways to perform privileged tasks without sudo, hinting at potential privilege-escalation risks. It highlights why secure defaults and careful permission handling matter when AI-generated code is used.
items.summary_zh: 透露显示通过 Codex 的工作流，可在不使用 sudo 的情况下完成特权任务，提示潜在的特权提升风险。强调在使用 AI 代码时，需依赖安全默认设置和严格权限控制。

items.title_en: Cloudflare Turnstile requiring fingerprintable WebGL
items.title_zh: Cloudflare Turnstile 要求可指纹化的 WebGL
items.summary_en: Cloudflare Turnstile now reportedly relies on fingerprintable WebGL, enabling GPU-based device fingerprinting. That blurs the line between anti-bot verification and user surveillance, raising privacy concerns for developers and users who expected a privacy-friendly CAPTCHA alternative. Expect calls for opt-outs or mitigations in browsers and privacy tooling.
items.summary_zh: 据称 Cloudflare Turnstile 现正使用可指纹化的 WebGL，借助 GPU 渲染实施设备指纹。这模糊了反机器人验证与用户监控之间的界线，引发对隐私的担忧，尤其是对期待更隐私友好验证码的用户与开发者。浏览器和隐私工具可能会提出规避或缓解措施的呼声。

items.title_en: Chuwi Minibook X
items.title_zh: Chuwi Minibook X
items.summary_en: Chuwi's Minibook X continues the brand's budget-friendly ultrabook line with a compact footprint and entry-level specs. It highlights ongoing demand for portable, affordable laptops in budget-conscious markets and the trade-offs between price, battery life, and performance.
items.summary_zh: Chuwi Minibook X 延续了品牌的经济型超极本路线，体积紧凑、配置入门。它体现了在预算友好市场对便携笔记本的持续需求，以及价格、续航和性能之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Creatine raises brain energy levels and slows cognitive decline: study
items.title_zh: 肌酸提升大脑能量并减缓认知衰退：研究
items.summary_en: A new study links creatine supplementation to higher brain energy and slower cognitive decline in early-stage conditions. While promising, results are early and require replication across broader populations before changing clinical practice.
items.summary_zh: 一项新研究显示肌酸补充可能提升大脑能量、在早期认知衰退阶段减缓恶化。尽管有希望，但结果仍处于初步阶段，需要在更广泛的人群中重复验证，方能影响临床实践。

items.title_en: It's Not Just X. It's Y
items.title_zh: 不仅是 X，而是 Y：后训练数据的影响
items.summary_en: The piece argues that data isn’t just what models learn during training; post-training data and user interactions shape model behavior over time. This raises privacy, consent, and governance questions for developers and users alike as AI systems continue to evolve after deployment.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，数据不仅在训练阶段塑造模型，后训练阶段的数据与用户交互也在持续影响模型行为。这为开发者和用户带来隐私、同意与治理方面的问题，尤其是在AI系统部署后继续演化。

items.title_en: Shift from a leader-follower to a leader-leader approach
items.title_zh: 从领导-追随者到领导-领导的转变
items.summary_en: Shift from a leader-follower to a leader-leader approach
items.summary_zh: 作者提出企业应从传统的领导-追随结构转向领导-领导的协作模式，强调共同决策、跨团队 mentorship 与快速适应能力的提升，并给出实现路径与注意要点。

items.title_en: 1-Bit Bonsai Image 4B Image Generation for Local Devices
items.title_zh: 1-Bit Bonsai：在本地设备上的 4B 图像生成
items.summary_en: A 4B-parameter image generation model dubbed 1-Bit Bonsai runs on consumer hardware, enabling on-device, offline image synthesis. This kind of lightweight model lowers hardware and privacy barriers for on-device AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: 一个名为 1-Bit Bonsai 的 4B 参数图像生成模型能够在普通设备上离线运行，实现在本地完成图片合成。此类轻量化模型降低了对高性能显卡的依赖，提升了隐私和离线工作流的可用性。

items.title_en: ChatGPT for Google Sheets exfiltrates workbooks
items.title_zh: Google 表格的 ChatGPT 插件可能外泄工作簿数据
items.summary_en: Running ChatGPT inside Google Sheets can inadvertently expose workbook content to the model, creating data leakage risks. This demonstrates how AI copilots can unintentionally exfiltrate sensitive data via prompts and interactions. It underscores the need for strict data governance and prompt-design safeguards when embedding AI in productivity tools.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google 表格中运行 ChatGPT 可能无意间将工作簿内容暴露给模型，带来数据外泄风险。这揭示了 AI 辅助工具在提示与交互中可能无意地外带敏感数据。强调在把 AI 嵌入生产力工具时，需加强数据治理与提示设计的防护。

items.title_en: Dav2d
items.title_zh: Dav2d
items.summary_en: Dav2d is a fast, open-source video decoder project.
items.summary_zh: Dav2d 是一个开源的视频解码库，旨在提供高效解码性能。

items.title_en: 'Backrooms' Stuns with $81M Debut
items.title_zh: Backrooms：8100万美元首映震撼票房
items.summary_en: Backrooms delivers a standout $81M opening weekend, signaling strong audience appetite for high-energy genre cinema. The debut demonstrates the viability of niche concepts breaking through to broad audiences in a competitive market.
items.summary_zh: Backrooms 以8100万美元的首映周末票房取得瞩目成绩，显示观众对高能量类型片的强烈需求。此首映表明小众题材也能在竞争激烈的市场中打入主流观众。

items.title_en: Microsoft Office 2019 and 2021 for Mac view-only conversion
items.title_zh: Mac 版 Office 2019 与 2021 的只读转换
items.summary_en: Describes a view-only conversion feature for Office 2019 and 2021 on Mac, affecting how documents are shared and edited. The change has implications for collaboration, licensing, and cross-platform workflows.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了 Mac 版 Office 2019 与 2021 的只读转换功能，影响文档分享与编辑权限。此变更对协作流程、授权与跨平台工作流有实际影响。

items.title_en: The solution might be cancelling my AI subscription
items.title_zh: 解决方案可能是取消我的 AI 订阅
items.summary_en: The author contemplates canceling an AI subscription as a practical response to rising costs and mixed value. They weigh alternatives like local or open-source models and cheaper workflows, suggesting that for some users, a subscription might not be the best bet long-term.
items.summary_zh: 作者在日益上涨的成本和价值波动之间，思考取消人工智能订阅是否是更实际的解决方案。他们权衡本地模型、开源替代品等选项，认为对部分用户而言，订阅长期可能并非最佳选择。

items.title_en: I put a datacenter GPU in my gaming PC
items.title_zh: 我用 £200 把数据中心 GPU 装进了我的游戏 PC
items.summary_en: I fitted a data-center GPU into a gaming PC for around £200, enabling local large-language-model inference. The post walks through the practicalities, including power, cooling, and driver quirks, and compares the economics against cloud-based inference.
items.summary_zh: 作者用约 200 英镑把数据中心级显卡装入游戏平台电脑，以实现本地大模型推理。文中讲解了功耗、散热、驱动兼容等实际挑战，并把本地推理的成本与云端推理进行了对比。

items.title_en: United Airlines 767 returns to Newark after Bluetooth name sparks alert
items.title_zh: 联合航空 767 因蓝牙名称触发警报返航纽瓦克
items.summary_en: A United Airlines 767 diverted to Newark after a Bluetooth name triggered an alert, prompting security protocols to kick in. The incident underscores how small device-level identifiers can influence aviation safety and the challenges of pervasive Bluetooth in cabins.
items.summary_zh: 一架联合航空 767 因蓝牙名称触发警报而返航纽瓦克，启动安保程序。事件凸显机舱内的蓝牙设备标识可能对航空安全产生影响，以及在舱内广泛使用蓝牙所带来的挑战。

items.title_en: Deflock hits 100k ALPRs Mapped in USA
items.title_zh: Deflock 已将美国 ALPR 摄像头映射至 10 万处
items.summary_en: Deflock has mapped over 100k ALPR cameras in the U.S., creating a public-facing map of automated license plate readers. The project highlights surveillance scale and raises privacy concerns, while enabling policy analysis and research.
items.summary_zh: Deflock 已在美国映射超过 10 万处 ALPR 摄像头，发布公开地图。该工作揭示了监控网络的规模，同时引发隐私和治理方面的讨论。

items.title_en: The Website Specification
items.title_zh: 网站规范
items.summary_en: A proposal outlining a formal specification for websites to standardize structure, semantics, and tooling.
items.summary_zh: 提出对网站进行正式规范的提案，旨在统一网页结构、语义和相关工具链。

items.title_en: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions
items.title_zh: Meta 推出 Instagram、Facebook 与 WhatsApp 订阅服务
items.summary_en: Meta officially rolls out paid subscriptions across its main apps, signaling a shift toward creator monetization and premium experiences. Coupled with forthcoming AI features, the move hints at how social platforms may balance revenue, user value, and data use going forward.
items.summary_zh: Meta 正式在旗下应用推出付费订阅，标志着向创作者变现和更高端体验的转型。再加上未来的 AI 功能，这一举措暗示了社交平台在未来如何平衡收入、用户价值与数据使用。

items.title_en: Domain expertise has always been the real moat
items.title_zh: 领域专长一直是最真实的护城河
items.summary_en: Domain expertise remains a durable moat for tech teams and incumbents. Beyond scale and data, deep domain know-how enables sharper product decisions, faster iteration, and trusted customer relationships.
items.summary_zh: 领域专长长期构成公司竞争壁垒。虽然规模和网络效应重要，但对行业洞察、客户场景的深度理解往往决定了竞争优势的持久性。

items.title_en: Restartable Sequences
items.title_zh: 可重启序列（Restartable Sequences）
items.summary_en: Restartable Sequences (rseq) is a Linux kernel feature that lets a thread execute a tiny critical section and restart safely if interrupted, reducing costly synchronization. The piece outlines how rseq enables fast-path code and where it fits in performance-sensitive apps, with caveats around portability and safety.
items.summary_zh: Restartable Sequences（rseq）是一个 Linux 内核特性，允许线程在被中断时安全地重启极小的临界区，从而降低同步成本。文章解释了 rseq 如何让快速路径代码更高效，以及在对性能敏感的应用中的适用场景，同时也提示了可移植性与安全性方面的注意。

items.title_en: The Speed of Prototyping in the Age of AI
items.title_zh: AI时代的原型设计速度
items.summary_en: AI accelerates prototyping by automating design, code, and testing loops, letting teams iterate ideas faster. The flip side is higher risks of tech debt and quality gaps, so teams should pair speed with guardrails like clear requirements and automated testing.
items.summary_zh: AI 让原型设计循环更加快速，自动化设计、编码和测试，帮助团队更快将想法落地。与此同时，追求速度也可能带来技术债务和质量隐患，因此需要用清晰需求和自动化测试等防护措施来平衡。

items.title_en: Odysseus – self-hosted AI workspace
items.title_zh: Odysseus — 自托管的 AI 工作区
items.summary_en: Odysseus provides a self-hosted AI workspace for teams to manage models and experiments locally, emphasizing privacy, reproducibility, and control. It appeals to developers seeking to avoid vendor lock-in and data leaving their environment.
items.summary_zh: Odysseus 提供一个面向团队的自托管 AI 工作区，便于在本地管理模型与实验，强调隐私、可重复性和对环境的控制。适合希望避免厂商锁定与数据外流的开发者。

items.title_en: Atherton spent $145K to delay train electrification. The rest of us paid $400M
items.title_zh: 阿瑟顿花费14.5万美元拖延 Caltrain 电气化，其余人却花4亿美元
items.summary_en: Atherton spent $145k in legal actions to delay Caltrain electrification, while the broader project cost taxpayers $400M and added years to the timeline. This case illustrates how local opposition can push infrastructure costs onto the public, affecting commuters and regional planning. For tech readers, it highlights governance and policy friction that directly shapes transit tech deployments.
items.summary_zh: 阿瑟顿以14.5万美元的诉讼费拖延 Caltrain 电气化项目，而全局成本却让纳税人多付4亿美元并延迟数年。这件事揭示了地方阻挠如何把基础设施成本推给公众，影响通勤与区域规划。对科技读者而言，这是一次关于治理与政策摩擦如何影响交通技术部署的警示。

items.title_en: London's Free Roof Terraces
items.title_zh: 伦敦的免费屋顶露台
items.summary_en: London's Free Roof Terraces highlights accessible rooftop spaces in the city, offering viewpoints over historic neighborhoods. It's a small lens on how cities can repurpose vertical space for public benefit.
items.summary_zh: 伦敦的免费屋顶露台介绍了城市中可公开进入的屋顶空间，提供历史景观的视角。 文章讨论此类露台如何提升城市生活，为公众提供绿色、共享的空间且无需收费。 这折射出城市在垂直空间利用方面的潜在方向。

items.title_en: Please Do Not Vibe Fuck Up This Software
items.title_zh: 请勿糟蹋此软件的体验
items.summary_en: An explicit GitHub issue warning not to vibe up the software, emphasizing the need to preserve reliability and UX. It highlights the risk of sloppy changes or misuse that could degrade performance. The post reflects the candid, sometimes humorous tone common in open source discussions.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个直接的 GitHub 问题，提醒不要糟蹋这款软件的体验，强调保持可靠性和用户体验的重要性。 它指出粗心的变更或误用可能降低性能。 这一讨论反映了开源社区中直率和有时幽默的沟通风格。

items.title_en: Daily pill can double survival time for deadliest cancer, trial shows
items.title_zh: 每日口服药物可将最致命癌症的生存期翻倍，临床试验显示
items.summary_en: A daily pill in a pancreatic cancer trial doubled median survival, representing a potential breakthrough in a notoriously hard-to-treat cancer. While promising, results need independent replication and longer follow-up to confirm durability and safety.
items.summary_zh: 在一项针对胰腺癌的临床试验中，日服药物使中位生存期翻倍，显示出在这一顽疾上的潜在突破。需进一步独立验证和更长随访以确认长期效果与安全性。

items.title_en: Rubin Tracks Skyscraper-Size Asteroids and Failed Supernovas
items.title_zh: Rubin 追踪摩天级小行星、失败的超新星与星际来客
items.summary_en: An in-depth look at Rubin's work mapping colossal solar system bodies, failed supernovae, and mysterious interstellar visitors. The feature underscores how large-scale surveys and careful data interpretation drive new insights and push telescope design.
items.summary_zh: 深入介绍 Rubin 在追踪巨型小行星、坍缩失败的超新星以及星际来客方面的研究。该报道凸显大规模观测和谨慎的数据解读如何带来新发现，并推动望远镜与观测策略的改进。

items.title_en: Show HN: Streambed – Stream Postgres to Iceberg on S3, Supports Postgres Wire
items.title_zh: Show HN：Streambed — 将 Postgres 数据流式传输到 Iceberg（S3），并支持 Postgres Wire
items.summary_en: Streambed is an open-source tool that streams PostgreSQL data into Iceberg on S3, including support for the Postgres wire protocol. It simplifies real-time analytics architectures by enabling seamless data movement from transactional databases to a data lake format.
items.summary_zh: Streambed 是一款开源工具，可将 PostgreSQL 数据流式写入 S3 上的 Iceberg，并支持 Postgres wire 协议。它通过实现从事务数据库到数据湖格式的数据无缝移动，简化了实时分析架构。

items.title_en: Backpressure is all you need
items.title_zh: 回压才是王道
items.summary_en: Backpressure is all you need argues that backpressure is the essential principle for building robust streaming systems, preventing memory pressure spikes and cascading failures.
items.summary_zh: 回压才是王道 主张回压是构建健壮流式系统的关键原则，能防止内存压力激增和级联故障。文中给出跨语言的实现模式与实用示例，帮助工程师在生产中落地回压。

items.title_en: Shantell Sans (2023)
items.title_zh: Shantell Sans（2023）
items.summary_en: A look into the design process behind Shantell Sans, a distinctive typeface known for expressive strokes. The piece reveals design decisions, iteration steps, and considerations for legibility across digital media.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦 Shantell Sans 的设计过程，揭示这款字体的独特表达性笔划与风格。内容涵盖设计决策、迭代过程，以及在数字媒介中保持可读性的考量。

items.title_en: US healthcare still stupidly expensive, with pathetic outcomes, study finds
items.title_zh: 美国医疗依然价格昂贵且效果不佳：研究发现
items.summary_en: A study confirms that US healthcare remains exorbitantly expensive with disappointing outcomes, underscoring systemic inefficiencies and price opacity. The findings push policymakers and health-tech developers to rethink pricing, access, and value metrics.
items.summary_zh: 研究证实美国医疗仍然价格高昂、效果不理想，暴露系统性低效与价格透明度不足的问题。这一发现促使政策制定者和健康科技开发者重新考量定价、可及性和价值评估。

items.title_en: Unlawful by design: Exposing the human rights costs of generative AI
items.title_zh: 设计中的违法之处：揭示生成式 AI 的人权成本
items.summary_en: Amnesty International argues that generative AI systems embed and amplify human rights harms—from mis/disinformation and labor issues to bias and surveillance. The report calls for stronger safeguards, transparency, and accountability in AI development and deployment.
items.summary_zh: 大赦国际指出生成式 AI 系统加剧并放大人权受害风险，涵盖误导信息、劳工问题、偏见与监控等方面。报告呼吁在 AI 的开发与部署中加强监管、透明度与问责机制。

items.title_en: OpenRouter raises $113M Series B
items.title_zh: OpenRouter 完成 1.13 亿美元 B 轮融资
items.summary_en: OpenRouter has raised $113 million in a Series B round, signaling strong investor confidence in its programmable networking platform. The funding should accelerate product expansion, go-to-market, and international scaling as the company competes in the growing edge and cloud networking space.
items.summary_zh: OpenRouter 宣布完成 1.13 亿美元的 B 轮融资，体现投资人对其可编程网络平台的信心。资金将推动产品扩张、市场拓展与国际化布局，加速在边缘与云网络领域的竞争力提升。

items.title_en: Re: [PATCH] OOM_pardon, a.k.a. don't kill my xlock (2004)
items.title_zh: 关于 OOM_pardon：请别把我的 xlock 杀死
items.summary_en: A patch discussion centers on protecting a specific process (xlock) from the Linux OOM killer, highlighting the tension between memory pressure and critical user-facing tasks. The change could improve stability for screensavers or lock screens but may shift memory pressure to other processes.
items.summary_zh: 这篇补丁讨论聚焦于在内存不足时保护特定进程（xlock）不被 OOM killer 终止，凸显内存压力和关键用户任务之间的矛盾。该改动可能提升锁屏/屏幕保护程序的稳定性，但也可能把内存压力挪给其他进程。

items.title_en: The AV2 Video Standard Has Released (Final v1.0 Specification)
items.title_zh: AV2 视频标准已发布（最终 v1.0 规格）
items.summary_en: Open, royalty-free AV2 video codec standard reaches its final 1.0 specification, signaling readiness for real-world deployments and hardware support. It promises improved compression efficiency and a broader ecosystem compared with older codecs.
items.summary_zh: 开放、免版税的 AV2 视频编解码器达到最终版规范1.0，标志着可进入实际部署与硬件支持的阶段。相较于旧有编解码器，AV2 在压缩效率与生态系统方面的提升可能改变流媒体、广播和开放媒体的格局。

items.title_en: You weren't meant to have a boss (2008)
items.title_zh: 你本不该有老板（2008）
items.summary_en: Paul Graham's You Weren't Meant to Have a Boss (2008) argues for reducing hierarchical management and empowering individuals, critiquing traditional bosses and suggesting flatter, more autonomous work structures.
items.summary_zh: 保罗·格雷厄姆的《你本不该有老板》（2008）主张减少等级化管理，强调个人自治与更扁平的工作结构，对传统的老板制提出批评。文中探讨了替代性组织模式和自我驱动的工作方式。

items.title_en: The History of "Prisencolinensinainciusol"
items.title_zh: Prisencolinensinainciusol 的历史
items.summary_en: An exploration of the history and cultural impact of Prisencolinensinainciusol, the famous playful Italian-sounding song, examining how language can transcend meaning to spark global curiosity.
items.summary_zh: 揭示Prisencolinensinainciusol 的历史与文化影响，这首以 invented 像意的意大利语风格著名歌曲，探讨语言如何超越意义，激发全球好奇心。

items.title_en: Accenture to acquire Ookla
items.title_zh: 埃森哲收购 Ookla
items.summary_en: Accenture plans to acquire Ookla to bolster network intelligence and enterprise AI services, leveraging Ookla's vast broadband measurement data to fuel analytics and experiences. The deal signals a push toward data-driven networking solutions and may reshape competitive benchmarks for performance testing in enterprise networks.
items.summary_zh: 埃森哲拟通过收购 Ookla，借助其海量网络测量数据来加强网络智能和企业 AI 服务。此举反映出向数据驱动的网络解决方案转型的行业趋势，可能重塑相关市场的竞争格局。

items.title_en: Openrsync: An implementation of rsync, by the OpenBSD team
items.title_zh: Openrsync：OpenBSD 团队实现的 rsync
items.summary_en: Openrsync is a new rsync implementation by the OpenBSD team, aiming to provide compatible, secure, and possibly faster file syncing. It highlights how open-source re-implementations can improve security and interoperability while preserving a familiar workflow.
items.summary_zh: Openrsync 是 OpenBSD 团队开发的新的 rsync 实现，旨在提供兼容、安全、甚至可能更高效的文件同步。此举凸显了开源重实现如何在保持原有工作流的同时改善安全与互操作性。

items.title_en: Pandoc Templates
items.title_zh: Pandoc 模板
items.summary_en: Pandoc Templates is a curated collection and guide for templates used with Pandoc, enabling consistent styling across formats like HTML, LaTeX, and DOCX. It helps users reuse, customize, and share templates to streamline document conversion from Markdown.
items.summary_zh: Pandoc 模板是一个面向 Pandoc 的模板资源集合与使用指南，方便在 HTML、LaTeX、DOCX 等格式之间保持一致的样式。用户可以重复使用、定制和分享模板，从而在从 Markdown 转换文档时提高效率。

items.title_en: Voxel Space (2017)
items.title_zh: 体素空间
items.summary_en: Voxel Space is a compact exploration of voxel-based space rendering, likely a browser-based demo or library for real-time 3D visuals.
items.summary_zh: Voxel Space 是对基于体素的空间渲染的简要探索，可能是一个基于浏览器的演示或库，用于实时呈现三维像素化画面。

items.title_en: SICP Video Lectures (1986)
items.title_zh: SICP 视频讲座（1986）
items.summary_en: SICP Video Lectures (1986) presents Abelson and Sussman’s classic MIT lectures in video form, showcasing fundamental ideas in abstraction and programming with Scheme. The resource remains a foundational influence on many programmers and CS educators.
items.summary_zh: SICP 视频讲座（1986）以视频形式呈现 Abelson 与 Sussman 的经典课程，展示用 Scheme 进行抽象与编程的核心思想。作为计算机科学教育的奠基性资源，它对后来一代程序员和教学方法影响深远。

items.title_en: Mechanical Pencil: An illustrated celebration of the engineering around us
items.title_zh: 机械铅笔：对周围工程的插画庆典
items.summary_en: Mechanical Pencil is a visually rich site celebrating the engineering around us through illustrations. It highlights a range of everyday innovations, offering readers a design-minded look at how things work. The result is a creative reminder of engineering artistry that complements technical interests.
items.summary_zh: 机械铅笔是一个以插画方式庆祝我们周围工程的视觉作品集。 它聚焦日常创新，提供设计导向的视角来理解事物的工作原理。 这是一份将工程之美以艺术化方式呈现、与技术兴趣相得益彰的资源。

items.title_en: Zig: Build System Reworked
items.title_zh: Zig：构建系统重构
items.summary_en: Zig has redesigned its build system to improve expressiveness and cross-platform support. The overhaul streamlines build.zig scripts, improves dependency management, and strengthens cross-platform workflows, signaling a renewed emphasis on developer ergonomics.
items.summary_zh: Zig 对其构建系统进行了重新设计，旨在提升表达能力和跨平台支持。改造简化了构建脚本、改进依赖管理，并加强与工具链的集成，体现出对开发者体验的关注。

items.title_en: New solar desalination breakthrough makes fresh water without toxic brine
items.title_zh: 太阳能淡化新突破：不产生有毒盐水的淡水生产
items.summary_en: A solar desalination breakthrough enables fresh water production with no toxic brine discharge. If scalable, it could transform water supply in arid regions while reducing environmental impact.
items.summary_zh: 太阳能淡化方面的新突破实现了无有毒盐水排放的淡水生产。若能规模化，将有望改变干旱地区的水资源供应并降低环境影响。

items.title_en: A pictorial introduction to differential geometry (2017)
items.title_zh: 微分几何图解入门（2017）
items.summary_en: A pictorial introduction to differential geometry (2017) uses diagrams and imagery to make advanced math more approachable. It covers core ideas such as manifolds, connections, and curvature with intuitive visuals. It's a handy resource for students or engineers needing geometric intuition.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇以图解方式介绍微分几何的2017年作品，通过大量图示将高等数学的概念变得直观。 内容涵盖流形、连接与曲率等核心要点。 对需要几何直觉的学生或工程师来说，是一份实用的学习资源。

items.title_en: Avian Visitors
items.title_zh: 鸟类来访者
items.summary_en: A project focused on documenting visiting birds, blending natural observation with accessible visuals.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦于记录来访鸟类，将自然观察与易于理解的视觉呈现结合起来。

items.title_en: FROST: Fingerprinting Remotely using OPFS-based SSD Timing [pdf]
items.title_zh: FROST：基于 OPFS 的 SSD 时序可进行远程指纹识别
items.summary_en: FROST presents a method to fingerprint devices remotely by analyzing SSD timing via the File System Access API (OPFS), revealing a novel web-side channel risk. Defenses include reducing timing leakage and restricting access to low-level IO.
items.summary_zh: FROST 提出通过 OPFS 的 SSD 时序实现对设备的远程指纹识别，揭示一种新的网页侧信道风险。防御包括降低时序泄露和限制对底层 IO 的访问。

items.title_en: Zig ELF Linker Improvements Devlog
items.title_zh: Zig ELF 链接器改进开发日志
items.summary_en: Zig's ELF linker improvements promise faster builds, stronger symbol handling, and better cross-compilation across targets. The devlog highlights ongoing work to improve link-time performance and compatibility with diverse toolchains, which matters for large C/C++ and Zig projects.
items.summary_zh: Zig 的 ELF 链接器改进旨在提升构建速度、符号处理健壮性，以及跨目标的编译兼容性。该开发日志概述了对链接时性能和对多种工具链的持续适配，对大型 C/C++ 与 Zig 项目意义重大。

items.title_en: Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern integrated into Obsidian agenic workflow
items.title_zh: 将 Karpathy 的 LLM Wiki 模式整合进 Obsidian 的工作流
items.summary_en: Describes integrating the Karpathy-style LLM wiki pattern into an Obsidian knowledge workflow, enabling a scalable, interconnected note graph for AI research and development. The approach helps organize ideas, prompts, and references in a navigable system.
items.summary_zh: 介绍将 Karpathy 风格的 LLM Wiki 模式整合进 Obsidian 的知识工作流，打造可扩展、互联的笔记图，支持 AI 研究与开发。该方法有助于把想法、提示和参考文献整理成一个易于导航的系统。

items.title_en: Cheese Paper: a text editor specifically designed for writing
items.title_zh: Cheese Paper：专为写作设计的文本编辑器
items.summary_en: Presents Cheese Paper as a writing-focused editor that minimizes distractions and optimizes the drafting workflow, likely with focused modes, export options, and writer-friendly typography. Highlights why specialized writing tools matter.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Cheese Paper 作为专注写作的文本编辑器，强调最小化干扰、优化写作流程，并提供导出与排版友好的特性。强调此类专门工具对提升写作效率的作用。

items.title_en: Show HN: Atomic Editor – Obsidian-style live preview for CodeMirror 6
items.title_zh: Show HN：Atomic Editor—基于 CodeMirror 6 的 Obsidian 风格实时预览
items.summary_en: Show HN: Atomic Editor demonstrates an Obsidian-style live preview built on CodeMirror 6, offering a lightweight, integrated markdown preview for editors. It showcases how to combine rich preview rendering with a fast editing experience, useful for builders of knowledge-work apps.
items.summary_zh: Show HN: Atomic Editor 展示了在 CodeMirror 6 上实现的 Obsidian 风格实时预览，为编辑器提供轻量级的 Markdown 预览功能，兼顾快速编辑体验。它展示了将强大预览渲染与高效编辑融合的办法，对构建知识工作应用的开发者有参考价值。

items.title_en: Chibil: A C compiler targeting .NET IL
items.title_zh: Chibil：面向 .NET IL 的 C 编译器
items.summary_en: Chibil is a C compiler that targets .NET Intermediate Language, enabling C programs to run on the CLR. This bridges ecosystems and invites performance and interoperability trade-offs that interest systems programmers.
items.summary_zh: Chibil 是一个将 C 编译成 .NET IL 的编译器，使 C 程序能在 CLR 上运行，连接了两个生态系统，同时带来性能和互操作性的权衡。

items.title_en: Leo's first encyclical attacks technological messianism
items.title_zh: 利奥首部通谕抨击科技救世主义
items.summary_en: Leo's first encyclical critiques technological messianism, warning against the belief that technology alone will redeem society. It advocates for a balanced approach to innovation, tempering techno-utopian narratives with moral and social responsibility.
items.summary_zh: 利奥的第一部通谕批评科技救世主义，警示不要以科技来指望唯一解救社会。强调在创新中保持谨慎，强调道德和社会责任的重要性，抵制单纯的技术乌托邦叙事。

items.title_en: WH proposes rules giving political appointees final approval on research grants
items.title_zh: 白宫拟议新规，赋予政治任命者对研究资助的最终审批权
items.summary_en: The White House proposes granting political appointees final say on research grant approvals, potentially politicizing peer review and affecting funding outcomes. Critics warn it could chill academic independence and delay innovative science, while supporters argue for clearer alignment with national priorities.
items.summary_zh: 白宫拟议赋予政治任命者对研究资助的最终审批权，可能让同行评审政治化并影响资助结果。批评者担忧这会削弱学术独立性并延缓创新研究，支持者称其有助于对国家优先事项的对齐。

items.title_en: Parallel Reconstruction of Lawful TLS Wiretapping
items.title_zh: 对合法 TLS 监听的并行重建
items.summary_en: A project demonstrating how lawful TLS wiretapping can be reproduced in parallel, highlighting complexities in intercepting encrypted traffic and the importance of secure, auditable crypto tooling. It underscores evolving debates over privacy, surveillance, and the trade-offs in lawful interception tech.
items.summary_zh: 该项目在并行化框架中重现实验合法 TLS 拦截的过程，凸显对互联加密流量的拦截所面临的技术挑战与审计需求。也引发对隐私、合规与安全工具可信度的讨论。

items.title_en: Show HN: 500 years of Joseon court omens as an observability dashboard
items.title_zh: Show HN：用500年朝鲜王朝卜兆做成的可观测性仪表板
items.summary_en: A creative project that maps centuries of court omens to a modern observability dashboard, showcasing how historical data can be modeled with modern tooling for storytelling and insights. It illustrates the portability of observability concepts to unconventional data sources.
items.summary_zh: 一个将500年朝鲜王朝的卜兆映射为可观测性仪表盘的创意项目，展示历史数据也能用现代监控思路来讲故事和提取洞察。它展示了可观测性工具在非传统数据源上的潜力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Breathe CLI – Paced resonance breathing in the macOS terminal
items.title_zh: Show HN：Breathe CLI——在 macOS 终端中进行节拍共振呼吸
items.summary_en: Breathe CLI is a macOS terminal based tool that guides you through paced resonance breathing. Its simple CLI interface demonstrates how lightweight wellness tooling can integrate into a developer workflow. It shows how terminal apps can support focus and stress relief during long coding sessions.
items.summary_zh: Breathe CLI 是一个在 macOS 终端中引导节拍共振呼吸的工具。它的简易命令行界面展示了轻量级健康工具如何融入开发者的日常工作流程。该项目展示了在长时间编码中，终端应用也能支持专注与减压。

items.title_en: The people who actually want AI to replace humanity
items.title_zh: 真正想让 AI 替代人类的人
items.summary_en: Vox surveys people who want AI to replace humanity, exploring successionist and transhumanist ideas. It unpacks motivations, rhetoric, and potential risks of treating AI as humanity's successor, and the political and social implications of such beliefs.
items.summary_zh: 这篇 Vox 文章探讨那些希望 AI 替代人类的人群，深入解读“继承主义”等思潮及后人类主义的观点。文章分析了背后的动机、论述方式以及将 AI 视为人类接班者的潜在风险及社会政治影响。

items.title_en: AI job grief: A psychological crisis hitting tech workers
items.title_zh: AI 职业悲痛：科技工作者的心理危机
items.summary_en: A discussion of 'AI job grief'—the anxiety and identity disruption workers feel as automation encroaches on tasks—and its implications for retention, productivity, and mental health in tech industry. It suggests strategies for managing transitions and upskilling.
items.summary_zh: 所谓的“AI 职业悲痛”描述了技术人员在自动化与任务外包压力下的焦虑与身份困境，对留任、生产力和心理健康有广泛影响。文中提出转型与技能提升等应对策略。

items.title_en: Dusklight – GC Twilight Princess Decompiled
items.title_zh: Dusklight：GameCube 版《暮色公主》反编译
items.summary_en: Dusklight is a decompilation of The Legend of Zelda: Twilight Princess for GameCube, illustrating how reverse engineering projects reveal internal structures of classic games. It demonstrates the ongoing interest in hardware-constrained software archaeology and can inform security research and emulator development.
items.summary_zh: Dusklight 将《塞尔达传说：暮色公主》 GameCube 版本进行反编译，揭示这款经典游戏的内部结构。该工作体现了对硬件约束下软件考古的热情，并可能为安全研究与模拟器开发提供线索。

items.title_en: I found a seashell in the middle of the desert
items.title_zh: 在沙漠深处发现一枚海螺
items.summary_en: A seashell found in the desert sparks reflection on curiosity and the value of unconventional experiments in technology. The project demonstrates how unexpected discoveries can inspire new ideas and broaden tooling or approaches.
items.summary_zh: 沙漠深处发现的海螺成为对好奇心与前沿实验价值的一个提醒。该项目展示了意外发现如何激发新的思路和方法。

items.title_en: Microcode inside the Intel 8087 floating-point chip: register exchange
items.title_zh: 英特尔 8087 浮点协处理器内的微代码：寄存器交换
items.summary_en: A peek inside the 8087’s microcode reveals how register exchange and operand handling were implemented in the original FPU. The piece sheds light on low-level CPU design decisions, illustrating the complexity hidden beneath vintage hardware.
items.summary_zh: 对英特尔 8087 浮点协处理器的微代码进行揭密，讲述寄存器交换和操作数处理在早期FPU中的实现方式。此文揭示了隐藏在古老硬件背后的低层CPU设计决策与复杂性。

items.title_en: Jef Raskin, the Visionary Behind the Mac (2013)
items.title_zh: 推动 Mac 的远见者：Jef Raskin
items.summary_en: A retrospective on Jef Raskin, the visionary behind the Macintosh, exploring his influence on human-centered design and the early ecology of Apple products. The piece reflects on his ideas about interface, usability, and the role of design leadership in shaping modern computing.
items.summary_zh: 对 Mac 创始人之一 Jef Raskin 的回顾，聚焦他在以人为本设计和苹果产品早期生态中的影响。文章探讨他对界面、易用性以及设计领导力的观点，以及它们如何塑造现代计算。

items.title_en: wolfSSL releases a new product; wolfCOSE a zero alloc C embbedded COSE stack
items.title_zh: wolfSSL 推出新产品 wolfCOSE：零分配的嵌入式 COSE 堆栈
items.summary_en: wolfCOSE offers a zero-allocation COSE stack designed for embedded C, reducing runtime memory churn and GC pressure, which is critical for constrained devices and secure communications. This release highlights how crypto stacks can optimize memory safety and performance in IoT and edge devices.
items.summary_zh: wolfCOSE 是一个零分配的嵌入式 COSE 堆栈，旨在减少运行时内存分配和碎片，降低嵌入式设备的资源压力。此举强调在物联网与边缘场景中，通过高效、内存友好型加密组件提升安全性与性能。

items.title_en: Talk Is Cheap: The Operational Impact of LLM Use
items.title_zh: 说起来容易：LLM 使用对运营的实际影响
items.summary_en: LLM usage shifts operations, enabling automation but requiring governance to manage risk, bias, and reliability. The piece argues that real ROI comes from disciplined processes, not mere exposure to models.
items.summary_zh: LLM 的使用正在改变运营模式，带来自动化潜力，同时也需要治理来应对风险、偏见和可靠性等问题。文章强调，真正的回报来自于有章法的流程管理，而非仅仅使用模型。

items.title_en: Design Engineering Magazine
items.title_zh: 设计工程杂志
items.summary_en: A publication focused on the intersection of design and engineering, showcasing interdisciplinary work, case studies, and practical insights for product teams.
items.summary_zh: 设计工程杂志聚焦设计与工程的交叉领域，呈现跨学科案例、实用洞察与产品团队的实践建议。

items.title_en: Show HN: Helios – what plug-in solar could generate for any address in Britain
items.title_zh: Show HN：Helios——英国任意地址的插件太阳能潜力估算工具
items.summary_en: Show HN: Helios explores plug-in solar for Britain—estimating how much solar energy a given address could generate, enabling homeowners and planners to model distributed generation.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Helios 探索在英国的插件式太阳能潜力，估算任意地址可产出的电力，用于帮助房主与规划者建模分布式发电。

items.title_en: Ahoy, DECmate II the little PDP-8 that could
items.title_zh: DECmate II：那个能干的 PDP-8
items.summary_en: DECmate II is a PDP-8-class microcomputer from DEC. The piece walks through restoration work, quirks of old hardware, and software challenges, illustrating why retrocomputing fans still care. It also highlights how these vintage systems helped shape early personal computing design and culture.
items.summary_zh: DECmate II 是 DEC 公司的一款基于 PDP-8 的微型计算机。 文章通过还原工作、硬件怪癖与软件挑战，展示了为什么退伍计算爱好者仍然热衷它，并强调这些老旧系统对早期个人计算机设计与文化的影响。

items.title_en: Werner Herzog in conversation with Paul Cronin (2014)
items.title_zh: 沃纳·赫斯特与保罗·克罗宁的对谈（2014）
items.summary_en: A 2014 conversation between visionary filmmaker Werner Herzog and photographer Paul Cronin offers rare insights into their creative processes, ethics, and how they perceive cinema. The transcript reads like a masterclass on art, memory, and the responsibilities of documentary storytelling.
items.summary_zh: 这段 2014 年的对谈汇集了导演维尔纳·赫斯特与摄影师保罗·克罗宁，对其创作流程、伦理观以及对电影的看法提供珍贵洞见。对话宛如关于艺术、记忆与纪实叙事责任的现场讲座。

items.title_en: Remove all LLM generated commits before people get hurt by this nonsense
items.title_zh: 在提交历史中移除所有 LLM 生成的提交
items.summary_en: A GitHub issue calls for removing all AI-generated commits to prevent polluting history and misleading diffs. It highlights governance needs around machine-generated code and tooling safeguards.
items.summary_zh: 一则 GitHub 问题呼吁移除所有由大语言模型生成的提交，以避免污染提交历史与误导性差异。凸显对机器生成代码的治理需求与工具安全性。

items.title_en: 86Box v6.0
items.title_zh: 86Box v6.0
items.summary_en: 86Box v6.0 is a PC emulator release expanding machine definitions, improving accuracy, and boosting DOS-era software compatibility. It remains a favorite for retro computing enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: 86Box v6.0 是 PC 仿真器的新版本，扩充了机型定义、提升了仿真精度，并增强对 DOS 时代软件的兼容性。 它继续成为复古计算爱好者的热门工具。

items.title_en: What if remote working, not AI, is to blame for weak junior hiring?
items.title_zh: 若是远程工作，而非 AI，成为初级招聘乏力的原因？
items.summary_en: The FT piece argues that remote work dynamics—hiring pipelines, wage inflation, and distributed interviewing—may be more responsible for weak junior hiring than AI automation. It explores implications for recruiters and policy on training, compensation, and onboarding.
items.summary_zh: 金融时报的文章认为，远程工作带来的招聘管道、薪资膨胀和分布式面试等因素，可能比 AI 自动化更致力于削弱初级岗位招聘。内容探讨对招聘、培训、薪酬和入职流程的影响。

items.title_en: A Gentle Introduction to Lattice-Based Cryptography [pdf]
items.title_zh: 格基密码学入门（PDF）
items.summary_en: This gentle introduction offers an accessible tour of lattice-based cryptography, outlining why hard lattice problems underpin quantum-resistant security. It covers core constructs like LWE and SIS in practical terms and discusses how these ideas translate into real-world cryptosystems.
items.summary_zh: 本文以通俗方式介绍格基密码学的核心概念，解释为何格的困难问题构成量子安全性的基石。聚焦 LWE、SIS 等关键构造及其在实际密码系统中的应用要点，便于读者把握该领域的要点。

items.title_en: Racket v9.2
items.title_zh: Racket 9.2 已发布
items.summary_en: Racket 9.2 arrives with language and tooling improvements, better performance, and bug fixes that benefit educators and researchers relying on the language for teaching and experimentation. The release reinforces Racket's emphasis on language-oriented programming and extensible tooling.
items.summary_zh: Racket 9.2 发布，带来语言与工具链的改进、性能提升及若干 bug 修复，特别惠及教学与研究场景。新版继续强化其面向语言的编程理念与可扩展工具集。

items.title_en: One year of Roto, a compiled scripting language for Rust
items.title_zh: 一年时间的 Roto：为 Rust 编写的编译型脚本语言
items.summary_en: Roto is a compiled scripting language designed for Rust, intended to be embedded and fast. After a year of development, the project highlights progress, design decisions, and compelling use cases for scripting in Rust ecosystems. It emphasizes performance, ergonomics, and seamless interoperability with Rust code.
items.summary_zh: Roto 是为 Rust 设计的编译型脚本语言，旨在便于嵌入且运行迅速。 一年来的开发中，项目展示了进展、设计取舍以及在 Rust 生态中对脚本化的潜在应用。 它强调性能、可用性以及与 Rust 代码的无缝互操作性。

items.title_en: Rotary GPU: Exploring Local Execution for Large MoE Models Under Limited VRAM
items.title_zh: Rotary GPU：在显存受限下对大型 MoE 模型的本地执行
items.summary_en: Presents Rotary GPU, a local-execution approach for running large Mixture-of-Experts models under limited VRAM, detailing memory management, partitioning, and potential inference gains in constrained environments.
items.summary_zh: 提出 Rotary GPU，在显存受限的环境中实现对大型 MoE 模型的本地执行。介绍内存管理、模型分区等策略，以及在资源有限场景下提升推理可行性的潜在收益。

items.title_en: Websites have a new way to spy on visitors: analyzing their SSD activity
items.title_zh: 网站新招隐形监视：分析 SSD 活动以窥探访客
items.summary_en: Researchers show websites can glean visitor info by analyzing SSD IO patterns, a surprising and invasive data leakage vector. It motivates stricter browser and OS controls to reduce micro-timing exposures.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员展示网站可以通过分析 SSD IO 模式来推断访客信息，成为一种令人意外且具侵入性的数据泄露途径。促使浏览器和系统加强对微时序泄露的防护。

items.title_en: Having your insulin pump die while you're on vacation
items.title_zh: 度假时胰岛素泵发生故障
items.summary_en: A personal account of insulin pump failure during vacation, revealing how medical IoT devices introduce new risks when away from home. It underscores the importance of backup plans, sensor redundancy, and support options for patients relying on connected devices.
items.summary_zh: 度假期间胰岛素泵发生故障，暴露了医用物联网设备在离家时的新风险。强调备份方案、传感器冗余和紧急支援对依赖连网设备的患者的重要性。

items.title_en: Decades of Effort Restore Steelhead and Salmon Passage on Alameda Creek
items.title_zh: 数十年努力重建阿拉梅达溪的钢头鲑鱼回游通道
items.summary_en: Over decades, agencies and communities removed barriers and restored habitat to reopen steelhead and salmon migrations on California's Alameda Creek. The effort improves biodiversity, supports endangered species recovery, and demonstrates scalable approaches for river restoration.
items.summary_zh: 数十年来，相关机构与社区清除阻碍、修复栖息地，使阿拉梅达溪的钢头鲑和鲑鱼能够重新回游。该工程提升了生物多样性，助力濒危物种恢复，并展示了可扩展的河流修复方法。

items.title_en: What are locusts and what happened to them?
items.title_zh: 蝗虫是什么，发生了什么？
items.summary_en: An explainer about locusts, possibly covering swarm biology, current outbreaks, and implications for agriculture and supply chains, with lessons for monitoring and predictive models.
items.summary_zh: 本文解释了蝗虫的生物学特征、群体行为及其暴发对农业和全球供应链的影响。并讨论监测与预测模型在应对蝗灾中的作用与挑战。

items.title_en: Navier-Stokes fluid simulation explained with Godot game engine
items.title_zh: 用 Godot 引擎讲解 Navier–Stokes 流体仿真
items.summary_en: Using the Godot engine to illustrate Navier–Stokes fluid dynamics demonstrates how accessible tools can teach and visualize complex physics in real time.
items.summary_zh: 该作品用 Godot 引擎演示 Navier–Stokes 流体动力学，展示了易获取的工具如何在实时环境中教学与可视化复杂物理现象。此举凸显开源游戏引擎在学习计算流体力学和生成真实视觉效果方面的潜力，且可能包含可复用的示例代码。

items.title_en: IXI's autofocusing lenses are almost ready to replace multifocal glasses
items.title_zh: IXIS 自动对焦镜片几乎可替代多焦点眼镜
items.summary_en: IXIS autofocusing lenses are nearing readiness to replace multifocal glasses, potentially disrupting the eyewear market and simplifying presbyopia correction for many users. If commercialized, the tech could shift how consumers manage focus across distance and near tasks.
items.summary_zh: IXIS 自动对焦镜片接近量产，可能取代多焦点眼镜，进而冲击眼镜市场并简化白内障前后年花眼矫正。若正式上市，用户在远近焦点切换的日常使用将更为便捷。

items.title_en: Linux/M68k
items.title_zh: Linux/M68k
items.summary_en: Linux on Motorola 68k persists, with ongoing support and ports that keep retro and embedded projects alive. The status offers a window into long-standing open-source maintenance and the value of historical architectures.
items.summary_zh: Linux/M68k 仍在维护，仍有持续的端口和支持，使复古与嵌入式项目得以生存。展现开源维护的坚持以及历史架构的价值。

items.title_en: Security Envelope Pattern collection – S.E.C.R.E.T
items.title_zh: 安全信封模式集合——S.E.C.R.E.T
items.summary_en: Security Envelope Pattern collection – S.E.C.R.E.T is a curated set of security design patterns aiming to better contain and protect data boundaries. It offers practical patterns for reducing data exposure, enforcing strict boundaries, and improving defense-in-depth, with examples and guidance for engineers.
items.summary_zh: 安全信封模式集合——S.E.C.R.E.T 是一组经筛选的安全设计模式，旨在更好地界定并保护数据边界。它提供降低数据暴露、强化边界约束、完善防御深度的实用模式和工程示例。

items.title_en: New Beam Spring Keyboards
items.title_zh: 新款 Beam Spring 键盘发布
items.summary_en: Model Keyboards unveils a new Beam Spring keyboard, reviving a classic spring-based switch with modern manufacturing. It targets keyboard enthusiasts seeking a tactile, vintage feel with current PC compatibility and build quality.
items.summary_zh: Model Keyboards 发布新款 Beam Spring 键盘，复兴经典的弹簧开关，结合现代制造工艺，面向追求传统打字手感和与现代电脑兼容性的键盘爱好者。

items.title_en: The four programming questions from my 1994 Microsoft internship interview (2023)
items.title_zh: 我在1994年微软实习面试中的四道编程题（2023 版）
items.summary_en: A retrospective look at four classic interview questions from a 1994 Microsoft internship, reexamined in 2023 context.
items.summary_zh: 回顾1994年微软实习面试中的四道经典编程题，在2023年的语境下重新审视。文中强调长期不变的算法思维以及基础知识在当今编程面试中的持久价值，为求职者提供可操作的要点。

items.title_en: Unix in East Germany (GDR) (1990)
items.title_zh: 1990 年的东德 Unix
items.summary_en: A look back at Unix adoption in East Germany around 1990, illustrating how scarcity, political context, and cross-border tech exchange shaped early computing culture in East Germany.
items.summary_zh: 回顾1990年前后东德地区对 Unix 的采用，展示了资源短缺、政治环境和跨境技术交流如何共同塑造了东德早期的计算机文化。

items.title_en: Using safe-area-inset to build mobile-safe layouts
items.title_zh: 使用 safe-area-inset 构建移动端安全布局
items.summary_en: A practical guide on using CSS safe-area-inset to build mobile-safe layouts that respect notches, rounded corners, and home indicators across devices. Includes tips for consistent padding, testing, and responsive design.
items.summary_zh: 介绍如何在移动端布局中使用 CSS 的 safe-area-inset，确保在不同设备的刘海、圆角和导航栏处保持可读性和可用性。提供一致的内距、测试和响应式设计的实用要点。

items.title_en: An Elephant Who Demonstrated That Her Species Might Be Self-Aware, Dies at 55
items.title_zh: 一头可能具备自我意识的象去世，享年55岁
items.summary_en: An Asian elephant named Happy showed signs of self awareness and died at 55.
items.summary_zh: 一头名为 Happy 的亚洲象在布朗克斯动物园去世，享年55岁，曾被认为可能具备自我意识。 这一案例为 elephants 自我意识的研究提供了重要证据，也提醒人们关注动物认知研究的重要性。

items.title_en: It takes two neurons to ride a bicycle (2004)
items.title_zh: 骑自行车需要两颗神经元
items.summary_en: It highlights implications for neuroscience, AI, and how we model minimal behavior.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨极简神经回路是否足以支撑简单运动任务，挑战了对神经元复杂性的普遍假设。对神经科学、人工智能以及最小行为建模具有启发意义。

items.title_en: Associative learning turns DEET from aversive to appetitive in Aedes aegypti
items.title_zh: 联结学习将 DEET 在埃及伊蚊身上的效价从厌恶转为偏好
items.summary_en: Associative learning can flip DEET's valence from aversive to appetitive in Aedes aegypti, showing that learned associations can override innate repellents. This has implications for vector control, challenging assumptions about repellents and guiding the development of new strategies that account for learned behavior. It also informs how researchers design mosquito behavioral assays and evaluate repellents.
items.summary_zh: 联结学习可以使埃及伊蚊对 DEET 的反应从排斢转为偏好，表明学习联结可覆盖先天驱避。 这一发现对害虫控制具有意义，挑战了对驱避剂的常规假设，并为开发考虑学习行为的新策略提供方向。 研究还将影响研究者在设计蚊虫行为实验和评估驱避剂时的做法。

items.title_en: 90% of the T Distribution
items.title_zh: t 分布的 90% 区间
items.summary_en: Provides an intuitive take on the t distribution's 90% central region, examining how sample size and degrees of freedom affect interval interpretation in small-sample contexts.
items.summary_zh: 对 t 分布的 90% 置信区间提供直观解读，讨论样本大小与自由度如何影响小样本情境下的区间解释。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open Envelope – an open schema for defining AI agent teams
items.title_zh: Open Envelope：定义 AI 代理团队的开放模式
items.summary_en: Open Envelope proposes a schema for composing AI agent teams, aiming to standardize roles, responsibilities, and interaction patterns across AI systems. The project offers a practical framework for building collaborative AI workflows and governance.
items.summary_zh: Open Envelope 提出一个用于定义 AI 代理团队的开放架构，力求标准化团队角色、职责与交互模式，促进跨系统协作。该框架为构建协作型 AI 流程与治理提供了可落地的方法。

items.title_en: Gustav Klimt and Egon Schiele in Conversation (2018)
items.title_zh: 克里姆特与席勒的对话（2018）
items.summary_en: Explores the dialogue between Klimt and Schiele through their drawings, highlighting stylistic contrasts, mutual influence, and the evolution of modern Austrian art.
items.summary_zh: 通过两位大师的素描作品，揭示克里姆特与席勒之间的对话、风格差异及相互影响，呈现奥地利现代艺术的发展脉络。

items.title_en: Inkstravaganza
items.title_zh: Inkstravaganza（墨迹狂欢）
items.summary_en: Inkstravaganza is a newsletter from Ink & Switch that showcases design experiments, thoughts on interaction, and ideas about making complex systems more usable. It collects short pieces, sketches, and reflections on how to craft tangible, humane tech.
items.summary_zh: Inkstravaganza 是 Ink & Switch 的一份时事通讯，汇集设计实验、交互思考与让复杂系统更易用的创意。内容包含简短文章、草图与对打造更具人性化的科技体验的反思。

items.title_en: Finding success in industry as a chip designer
items.title_zh: 在芯片设计行业取得成功
items.summary_en: The piece contrasts academic paths vs industry for chip designers, emphasizing practical engineering experience, fab collaboration, and end-to-end system thinking. It offers career strategies for researchers aiming to transition into impactful hardware roles.
items.summary_zh: 文章对比了学术路径与业界在芯片设计中的发展，强调实践工程经验、与晶圆厂的协作以及端到端的系统思维的重要性。为希望进入有影响力的硬件岗位的研究人员提供了职业策略。

items.title_en: The Genius of the Barn Owl's Feathers
items.title_zh: 猫头鹰羽毛的巧妙之处
items.summary_en: Barn owl feathers conceal microstructures that cancel noise as air flows through and around the wing, enabling near-silent flight. The piece links this natural ingenuity to biomimetic research aimed at quieter drones, wind turbines, and acoustic materials.
items.summary_zh: 猫头鹰羽毛的微观结构能抑制空气中的涡流和噪音，从而实现接近无声的飞行。文章将这一自然智慧与仿生研究联系起来，展示在无人机、风力发电机和声学材料领域的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Mysteries of the Griffin iMate
items.title_zh: Griffin iMate 的神秘之处
items.summary_en: Mysteries of the Griffin iMate dives into the obscure Griffin iMate hardware, collecting clues, prototypes, and community theories to puzzle out its purpose and why it remains enigmatic.
items.summary_zh: 《 Griffin iMate 的神秘之处》对 Griffin iMate 这一神秘硬件进行探究，收集线索、原型与社区推测，试图拼凑其用途与命运。

items.title_en: Avoiding Death on the Yellow Brick Road
items.title_zh: 黄砖路上的生存之道：规避致命风险
items.summary_en: A thoughtful piece on navigating AI-driven startups, focusing on avoiding common fatal missteps along the journey. It emphasizes pragmatic risk management, customer focus, and sustaining velocity without compromising quality.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨在 AI 驱动的创业环境中如何规避常见致命错误，强调务实的风险管理、以客户为中心以及在保持速度的同时保障质量。
